target.name: Guava
target.note: Only the library source (guava/src/com/google/common/) is indexed — the code an agent would search — not the test modules.

tasks.query: limiting the rate of operations by handing out permits smoothed over time
an in-memory cache that loads missing values and evicts entries by size or age
splitting a string on a separator, optionally trimming and dropping empty pieces
joining a sequence of values into one string with a separator
a probabilistic set membership test that can have false positives but no false negatives
mapping a hash value to one of n buckets so that adding a bucket moves few keys
argument checks that throw an exception when a precondition is not met
measuring elapsed time with start, stop and read of the duration
a map that also lets you look up keys by their value
walking the nodes of a graph in breadth first or depth first order
computing percentiles or quantiles of a collection of numbers
percent encoding a string so it is safe inside a url
dispatching posted events to all registered subscriber methods
configuring a cache's maximum size and expiration before building it
building an immutable list and copying elements into it
